headline: Jim Cramer Says Jim Conroy Is “Doing an Incredible Job at Ross Stores”
summary: Ross Stores, Inc. (NASDAQ:ROST) was among the stocks Jim Cramer discussed during Mad Money, as he highlighted a difficult backdrop for stocks. Cramer discussed the stock during the episode, as he remarked: Improved marketing brings customers into the stores. Once they’re there, they find better merchandising than they remember and a better in-store experience that […]
